name: 1forge.com
prose:
# 1Forge Finance APIs API

Stock and Forex Data and Realtime Quotes

## Getting started

The 1Forge Finance APIs API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://1forge.com/forex-quotes`.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to call this API.

## API reference

### GET /quotes
Get quotes for all symbols
Returns a single record.

### GET /symbols
Get a list of symbols for which we provide real-time quotes
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```
